callGraph.callee:
canonicalizeEvents(await events.effective({ from: rangeFrom, to: rangeTo }))
      .filter

this.rows
      .filter((r) => !companyId || r.companyId === companyId)
      .map((r) => ({ modId: r.modId, version: r.version, companyId: r.companyId, status: r.status, fileName: r.document.workbook.fileName, createdAt: r.createdAt }))
      .sort

[...this.byId.values()]
      .map(({ snap, uploadedAt }) => ({ snapshotId: snap.snapshotId, fileName: snap.fileName, uploadedAt }))
      .sort
